---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem would this solve? What are you trying to do that's hard today?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, sample prompts, or related issues. If this fits the V2 roadmap
(stack-review mode, multi-provider compare, more pricing regions), mention it.
